anchor_discipline: Issue Detection counts only. Non-obviousness of findings lives in Depth, not here.
Depth scores reasoning quality only. Count of issues lives in Issue Detection.
Novel Findings requires substantive issues only. Judge must write a 1-line justification per counted novel finding. Trivial nitpick padding does not score.

criteria.name: Issue Detection
criteria.description: Count of genuine, real issues found. Non-obviousness is NOT scored here — that lives in Depth.

anchors.0: No real issues found, or all findings are false positives.

criteria.name: Actionability
criteria.description: How actionable are the review's suggestions?

anchors.0: Vague only (e.g. 'this could be better', 'consider improving').
anchors.2: Most findings have code-level fixes or clear direction.
anchors.3: Every finding has a code-level fix or unambiguous direction.

criteria.name: Severity Accuracy
criteria.description: Does the review correctly prioritize findings by actual impact?

anchors.0: Severity is wrong throughout (nits called critical, or critical issues missed/downplayed).
anchors.1: Mostly correct prioritization, but at least one notable misorder.
anchors.3: Correct prioritization with explicit labels that accurately map to impact.

criteria.name: Coverage
criteria.description: Breadth — how well does the review span relevant concern areas?

anchors.0: Misses obvious security, performance, correctness, or pattern issues.
anchors.1: Catches the main concerns but misses some relevant areas.
anchors.2: Catches most relevant concerns across the diff.
anchors.3: Spans security, performance, correctness, and patterns as applicable to the diff.

criteria.name: Signal-to-Noise
criteria.description: Is every comment valuable, or does noise dilute the useful findings?

anchors.0: Mostly noise, false positives, or irrelevant observations.
anchors.1: More signal than noise, but meaningful noise present.
anchors.3: Every comment adds value; zero noise.

criteria.name: Depth
criteria.description: Reasoning quality only. Count of issues lives in Issue Detection.

anchors.1: Some logic or behavioral reasoning present.
anchors.3: Deep architectural reasoning covering invariants, cross-cutting concerns, or systemic risks.

criteria.name: Novel & Substantive Findings
criteria.description: Issues found by this review that are absent from the other review AND are substantive (not trivial nitpicks). Judge must list each counted finding with a 1-line justification.

output_schema.description: JSON structure the judge must produce per review.

justifications: one string per counted novel finding

judge.vote: majority (2/3 or 3/3) per criterion per review; no-majority flagged for human review

confidence.low: no majority — flag for human review
